headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Those leading the charge have not only realized strong financial performance but also propelled the broader industry’s returns as healthcare stocks have gained 9.5% over the past six months while the S&P 500 was up 6.2%.
